description: French-Canadian organized crime group consisting of nine brothers, active in Montreal from the 1950s to the mid-1980s. They engaged in extortion, drug trafficking, loan sharking, and murder, and were considered the most important criminal organization in Quebec by the Quebec Crime Commission. They rivaled the Cotroni family and were feared by outlaw motorcycle gangs and the Mafia.

country_links.evidence_quote: the Dubois Brothers could get a pound of marijuana for $30 imported from Mexico
country_links.context: The Dubois Brothers imported marijuana from Mexico.

country_links.evidence_quote: they began having roots in Pakistan because Adrien Dubois decided to introduce a Sixth Family associate to his impressive source of hashish through a corrupt government official in Pakistan
country_links.context: The Dubois Brothers established a drug supply source in Pakistan.
